summary: Actions not SHA-pinned (security issue, lines 15-17). Workflow installs actionlint but never runs it to validate itself. TC1/TC2/TC3 steps duplicate (lines 21-40); refactor to matrix strategy. Test harness has brittle hardcoded assertions tied to fixture data (lines 14-29). Main script well-structured with proper TypeScript; applyMaxAge uses > not >= (potential off-by-one boundary issue, line 66).
